creator: sbruno@FreeBSD.org
text:
I seem to remember this working in the past, but it certainly does not anylonger.  Running /bin/ps (jail native: armv6/mips) returns no output.

# file /bin/ps
/bin/ps: ELF 32-bit LSB executable, ARM, EABI5 version 1 (SYSV),
dynamically linked, interpreter /libexec/ld-elf.so.1, for FreeBSD 11.0
(1100071), stripped
# /bin/ps auwxxx
USER PID %CPU %MEM VSZ RSS TT  STAT STARTED TIME COMMAND

# file /nxb-bin/bin/ps
/nxb-bin/bin/ps: ELF 64-bit LSB executable, x86-64, version 1
(FreeBSD), statically linked, for FreeBSD 11.0 (1100077), not stripped
# /nxb-bin/bin/ps auwxxx
USER   PID %CPU %MEM    VSZ  RSS TT  STAT STARTED    TIME COMMAND
root 86070  0.0  0.0 140704 8340  4  IJ   13:49   0:00.15 login [pam]
(qemu-arm-static)
root 86071  0.0  0.0  10056 2112  4  SJ   13:49   0:00.05 -csh (csh)
root 86126  0.0  0.0   9348 1048  4  R+J  14:05   0:00.00
/nxb-bin/bin/ps auwxxx
